name: @sepehrmn/ncp
description: Canonical NCP (Neuro-Cybernetic Protocol) TypeScript types + transport-agnostic client. Wire-identical to the normative proto/ncp.proto contract (proto-native) and the Rust and Python peers.

scripts.regen: cargo test -p ncp-core --features ts && node ncp-ts/scripts/sync-bindings.mjs && tsc -p ncp-ts/tsconfig.json
